title: sclerolaena copleyi
intro: Sclerolaena copleyi, also known as the 'copper bur', is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is native to Western Australia, and traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Sclerolaena copleyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
